qa_pairs.question: Where can I find instructions on how to cite Gurobi software for an academic publication?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find instructions on how to cite Gurobi software for an academic publication by visiting the Gurobi support page at https://support.gurobi.com/hc/en-us/articles/360013195592-How-do-I-cite-Gurobi-software-for-an-academic-publication-.

qa_pairs.question: Is there a specific resource for citing Gurobi software in academic papers?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, there is a dedicated resource from Gurobi support that explains how to cite their software for academic publications. You can access it via the provided link in the documentation.
